status: WEB-SWEEP DRAFT. Cache parameters (read_multiplier, write_multiplier, ttl) sourced from secondary references on 2026-06-11. Model list prices are PLACEHOLDERS pending verification against official pricing pages + live API usage-metadata probes (Phase 1 / experiment E1). Nothing in this file is paper-grade until verified_by_probe=true and an archive.org snapshot of the official page is linked.

anthropic.probe_evidence_2026-06-12: results/probes/probe_anthropic_2026-06-12.json: same-model warm read (P1), cross-model isolation (P2), three separate billing meters with input_tokens EXCLUDING cache traffic (P3) all verified on claude-haiku-4-5 + claude-sonnet-4-6. Haiku min cacheable prefix bracketed (3784, 6095] anthropic-tokens, consistent with 4096. Anthropic tokenizer counts ~16% more tokens than cl100k on identical text. Price multipliers still unverified (need invoice cross-check).

openai.probe_evidence_2026-06-12: results/probes/probe_2026-06-12.json: same-model warm read (P1: 4992 cached of 5109 prompt tokens) and cross-model isolation (P2: 0 cached on identical prefix, different model) verified on gpt-5-mini + gpt-4.1-mini. Block granularity 128 confirmed (hits are exact multiples: 3072, 4992). Cache observed surviving >10 min across probe runs (TTL evidence). cached_tokens reported in usage.prompt_tokens_details (P3). Price multiplier (0.5) still unverified.
